commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix component library not loaded before code blocks render

ComponentLoader.loadAll() was deferred to onLayoutReady, which fires
AFTER views are rendered. Code block processors ran first, so file-based
components (Card, StatusBadge, etc.) weren't in scope yet.

Fix: load persistent state and component library eagerly in onload(),
before registering processors. Components are now guaranteed to be in
the registry when the first code block renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: battle room TenantID empty — bot messages silently dropped by broadcastToRoom

The match service doesn't populate tenant_id for matches, causing all battle rooms
to have TenantID="". Since broadcastToRoom returns early when TenantID is empty,
ALL bot messages (engagement bots, quiz bot) were silently dropped.

Fix: default TenantID to "default" (matching client JWT default) in both
InitBattleRooms and pollBattleRooms. Also adds admin quiz trigger endpoint
(POST /api/v1/admin/quiz/trigger) for on-demand testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix championship feature data leakage in feature engineering

championship_points used cumsum() without shift, so each race row
included its own points — leaking the result into the prediction.
Now uses cumsum().shift(1).fillna(0) so each row only sees standings
from before that race. This was causing inflated pre-weekend win
probabilities (e.g. Russell 53% → 13% for 2026 R1).

commit.message:
Fix India coal pricing: include statutory levies in market value

CIL base notified price was Rs 1,514/t (~$18), but buyers also pay:
royalty (14%), DMF (30% of royalty), NMET (2% of royalty), GST (5%),
and GST cess (Rs 400/t flat). All-in FSA cost ~Rs 2,270/t (~$27).
E-auction ~Rs 3,490/t (~$42). Blended estimate now ~$30/t.
India thermal market value revised from $20.4B to $30.6B.

Add 5 vault-aware hooks: useFrontmatter, useTheme, usePersistentState, useNote, useDataview

New hooks in scope:
- useFrontmatter() — returns current note's YAML frontmatter, reactive to changes
- useTheme() — returns "light" or "dark", updates on Obsidian theme toggle
- usePersistentState(key, default) — like useSharedState but survives note switches
  and restarts (backed by plugin.saveData with debounced writes)
- useNote(path) — read another note: {content, frontmatter, loading, error}
- useDataview(query) — run DQL query: {values, headers, loading, error}

6 new tests (55 total), example page 12-vault-hooks with combined dashboard.

Remove OVN from iapetus, add cross-environment DNS forwarding (#271)

* feat(cluster01): add optional development network

Add ovn-development network to base-infrastructure module following the
same pattern as gitops network. Enabled via enable_development variable.

- Add bridge and OVN network resources (conditional on enable_development)
- Add development-network profile for container attachment
- Add variables for IPv4/IPv6, NAT, and ACL configuration
- Wire up development network in cluster01 environment
- Default CIDR: 10.40.0.1/24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(cluster01): add Prefect server module and environment integration

Add a new modules/prefect Terraform module for deploying Prefect workflow
orchestration server as a system container with PostgreSQL backend. Integrate
it into cluster01 as an optional service (enable_prefect = false by default),
extending the shared PostgreSQL instance with a prefect database/user.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(iapetus): remove OVN networking and add cross-environment DNS forwarding

iapetus is a single host that doesn't need overlay networking. Remove all
OVN infrastructure (ovn-central, OVN networks, OVN LB) and use physical/bridge
networking with direct LAN IPs instead.

Add bidirectional DNS forwarding between iapetus and cluster01:
- iapetus forwards cluster01.accuser.dev and cluster01.incus to cluster01 CoreDNS
- cluster01 forwards accuser.dev and iapetus.incus to iapetus CoreDNS

Also fix Ansible role bugs:
- prometheus: validate prometheus_config_base64 (not prometheus_config)
- step_ca: move creates param inside command module dict

fix: use GitHub avatar instead of Twitter profile picture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix httpStatus: match on AWSErrorType.errorCode instead of Swift type name

The previous implementation used `type(of: error)` which produced the Swift
type name (e.g. `AWSResponseError`), never containing strings like
"validation". This caused all Bedrock ValidationExceptions to map to 500,
making clients retry non-retriable errors. Now casts to `AWSErrorType` and
matches on `errorCode` (e.g. "ValidationException"), returning 400 so
clients do not retry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

role-based access control, randomized admin port/path, env-based credentials.
Self-learning intelligence service with checkpoint rollback. One-click factory
reset (nuke + clone + auto-restart). Pino structured JSON logging with DB error
persistence and auto-fix scanner. Single-project autonomous mode with auto-discover.

commit.message:
chore: [no-issue] scope CI triggers to main branch to eliminate duplicate runs (#20)

Running on both push and pull_request caused every PR commit to trigger
two identical unit test runs. Scoping both triggers to main means CI fires
once per PR event and once on merge, with no duplication on feature branch pushes.
The integration job condition was redundant after this change and is removed.

commit.message:
Add error source highlighting, JSX insert commands, dev hot-reload notice

Feature #4: Better error display
- renderError now shows source code with the error line highlighted
- Parses line/column from error messages (e.g., "(3:5)")
- Shows 5-line context window around the error line
- Red highlight bar on the error line, line numbers in gutter

Feature #5: JSX insert commands (command palette)
- "Insert JSX block" — basic template with useState
- "Insert JSX component definition" — jsx:component:MyComponent template
- "Insert JSX block with useState + useEffect" — async data loading pattern
- Also added Notice on cache clear command

Feature #6: Dev hot-reload notification
- esbuild watcher writes .hotreload timestamp file on each deploy
- Plugin polls .hotreload every 2s via vault adapter
- Shows Obsidian Notice when a new build is detected:
  "React Renderer rebuilt — reload plugin or restart Obsidian to apply"

Ground failure-mode overlap note in Lampinen et al. empirical evidence

Content effects on reasoning tasks (syllogisms, Linda, Wason)
demonstrate the human-LLM failure-mode overlap is real, not
speculative. Wason divergence marks a transfer boundary. CoT
parallels structured templates as a mechanism. Promotes note
from seedling to current.

feat(maze): MAZE-Q2 Xu-Kaplan可変セルサイズ実装（cmd_361k_a3）

Xu-Kaplan SIGGRAPH 2007 公式 S=W/(1-G) に基づく可変セルサイズを実装。
暗部=小セル（密）、明部=大セル（疎）で情報密度を最適化する。

## 変更点
- grid_builder.py: compute_cell_size_map() 追加、CellGrid に row_heights/col_widths フィールド追加
  - build_cell_grid/with_edges/with_texture に variable_cell_size=False パラメータ追加
  - G_min=W/S_min=0.50, G_max=0.98 でクリップ後 S=W/(1-G) → 正規化
- exporter.py: _compute_offsets() / 更新済み _cell_center() を追加
  - maze_to_svg(): 均一 cell_size 座標 → 累積和ベース x_offsets/y_offsets 座標に変更
  - maze_to_png(): to_px() を x_offsets/y_offsets インデックス参照に変更
- __init__.py: variable_cell_size=False パラメータ追加、MASTERPIECE_PRESET に variable_cell_size:True 追加
- tests/test_density_variable_cell_size.py: 16テスト追加（sums_to_one/bright_is_larger/svg/png/SSIM等）

## 品質ゲート
- 全テスト: 476 passed（既存460件リグレッションなし + 新規16件）
- SSIM: uniform vs variable = 0.9602（グラデーション画像 10×10グリッド）
- variable_cell_size=False がデフォルト（後方互換維持）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
